name: agl-infra-troubleshooting
description: AGL Infrastructure troubleshooting — Proxmox VMs, meshagent leaks, AGLSRV1 diagnostics, VM104 RDP recovery

known_issues.symptom: Host overload, RDP inaccessible, network timeout
known_issues.root_cause: 30+ meshagent instances, 3 can leak 10-22GB RAM each
known_issues.resolution: kill -9 leaking PIDs, then qm stop 104 && qm start 104

diagnose_aglwk45: ssh root@100.107.113.33 'qm status 104 && qm agent 104 ping'
ssh root@100.107.113.33 'ps aux | grep meshagent | grep -v grep | awk "{if ($6 > 1000000) print \"LEAK: PID \"$2\" RSS \"int($6/1024)\"MB\"}"'
fix_meshagent_leak: ssh root@100.107.113.33 'ps aux | grep meshagent | grep -v grep | awk "{if ($6 > 1000000) print $2}" | xargs -r kill -9'
ssh root@100.107.113.33 'qm stop 104 && sleep 3 && qm start 104'
fix_vm_cpu_spike: ssh root@100.107.113.33 'ps aux | grep "kvm.*-id 104 " | grep -v grep | awk "{print \"CPU: \"$3\"%\"}"'
If CPU > 1000% sustained: ssh root@100.107.113.33 'qm stop 104 && sleep 3 && qm start 104'
